subject: Math
text: Numbers help us count things. We can count from 1 to 10. One means a single object. Two means two objects. A circle is a round shape with no corners. A square has 4 equal sides and 4 corners. A triangle has 3 sides and 3 corners.

subject: Math
text: A rectangle has 4 sides but opposite sides are equal. We can add numbers together. 1 plus 1 equals 2. Counting helps us know how many things we have. Numbers are everywhere around us.
